tracks.meaning: a platform or floor built across a ship, typically the upper surface of a ship's hull
a horizontal surface or platform used for storing items, such as a shelf or tier
to decorate or dress up something or someone
a pack or set of playing cards used for card games
a collection of recorded songs or musical tracks, typically on an album
a platform or veranda attached to the exterior of a building
a data structure or collection of organized information in software
to knock someone down or strike them forcefully
the floor or stage area of a theatre where performances take place
a level or layer of a multi-level structure such as a bus, aircraft, or parking garage
